arts.ttl: Salah and Alexander-Arnold spat caught on camera
arts.sum: Two of Liverpool’s stars, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Mohamed Salah, were involved in a heated clash during training ahead of the crucial Champions League match against PSG on Tuesday at Anfield. Both Alexander-Arnold and Salah are among Liverpool’s biggest stars, yet neither has renewed their contract, despite their current deals expiring on June 30.

arts.ttl: Move for Liverpool player ‘extremely complicated’ – Transfer drama stirred again
arts.sum: Barcelona could be an option for Liverpool star Mohamed Salah next season, according to Sport. The Egypt international’s contract expires in June and it’s not yet clear where he’ll play next season. Last summer, Barcelona had looked at the Liverpool player and even approached him. The contacts weren’t converted into negotiations, or an offer. Sport’s The post Move for Liverpool player ‘extremely complicated’ – Transfer drama stirred again appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United, Liverpool & Arsenal are closely monitoring 43 G/A winger
arts.sum: Barcelona’s Brazilian star Raphinha is being closely monitored by the biggest Premier League clubs, according to Caught Offside sources. In particular, Newcastle United, Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United are closely following the 28-year-old winger’s successful performances in La Liga. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs PSG – Champions League match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool have a slender lead to protect tonight as they welcome Paris Saint-Germain to Anfield for the second leg of their round-of-16 Champions League matchup. In the first leg substitute Harvey Elliott scored the winner within a minute of entering the field to complete a smash and grab performance. arts.ttl: When could Liverpool seal Premier League title?
arts.sum: Liverpool's march to the Premier League title seems inevitable now after they increase their lead at the top of the table to 15 points. When could they be confirmed as champions?

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé with best goals-per-game ratio of PSG’s QSI era
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé (27) has been on top form for Paris Saint-Germain throughout the 2025-26 campaign, leading Ligue 1 with 20 goals this season. The 2018 World Cup champion with Les…

arts.ttl: Bullish French media play up 'magnificent' PSG's chances of 'overthrowing' Liverpool in their own 'kingdom'
arts.sum: Liverpool is set to take on the Ligue 1 title holders with a one-goal lead following their fortunate game in the capital of France last week.

arts.ttl: PSG on brink of Champions League exit despite playing some of the best football in Europe
arts.sum: In other matches Tuesday, Barcelona defends a 1-0 lead against Benfica, Inter Milan hosts Feyenoord on the back of a 2-0 away win in the first leg, and Bayern Munich travels to Bayer Leverkusen after comprehensively beating its Bundesliga rival 3-0. “This is the most complete team we’ve faced so far,” Liverpool coach Arne Slot said about PSG.

arts.ttl: Liverpool open to selling five players, including £16m star who Arne Slot claimed is 'important' - Jouranlist
